Hero.subtitle: Track cycles, predict moods, and screen for PCOS with our intelligent assistant.

Chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your health assistant. Ask me anything about your cycle or health. 💕
Chat.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

chips.nextPeriodMsg: When is my next period predicted?
chips.pcodMsg: Can you explain what PCOD/PCOS is?
chips.nutritionMsg: What should I eat during my period?

Risk.title: PCOD Risk Assessment
Risk.logTwoCycles: Log at least 2 cycles to see your risk assessment.

features.title: Core Features
features.feat1Desc: Log your cycle with symptoms, mood, and flow intensity for accurate predictions.
features.feat2Desc: AI-powered cycle predictions that adapt to irregular patterns.
features.feat3Desc: Machine learning model assesses your risk based on cycle data and symptoms.

cycle.startTracking: Start tracking to see your cycle phase

onboarding.subtitle: Tell us about your last period so we can generate accurate predictions for you.

chat.title: Health Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about your cycle, symptoms, or reproductive health.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Your personalised health analytics at a glance.
insights.trendEmpty: No cycles recorded yet. Use the Track page to start your first period.
insights.symptomEmpty: No daily logs yet. Log your symptoms on the Track page or dashboard.
insights.moodEmpty: Log your mood daily to see your mood distribution here.

track.title: Cycle Tracker
track.subtitle: Log your daily symptoms and manage your cycle timeline.
track.noCycles: 💡 No cycles recorded yet. Click "🔴 Start Period Today" to begin tracking your first cycle. Saving daily logs separately will not create a cycle record.

footer.copyright: © 2025 HerCycle AI. Built with 💕 for women's health tech.

recommendations.consult: Consider consulting with a healthcare provider for detailed assessment.
recommendations.keepTracking: Keep tracking your cycle and maintaining healthy habits.
